title: Zhenan Bao - A skin for robots
text:
imagine how we can help patient who lost
their limb to regain their sense of
touch imagine how we can help robots to
learn to work safely with human the
answer is artificial electronic skin our
human body is not linear it's curved and
constantly moving so the big biggest
challenge is to make electronic
materials that are stretchable to be
able to conform with the movement of
human body much like when our finger
moves our skin also moves with it here
we design molecules that can slide past
each other to accommodate string
alternatively we design molecules that
can turn from the coiled confirmation in
into straight lines upon straing even
better we also have molecules that can
even self heal or be
biodegradable so now we can not only
make our Electronics to be able to help
patient with prothesis to regain sense
of touch help robots to learn to be
smarter but also we start to find
applications of these new electronic
materials in wearable electronics and
neural
implants
